publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-03-05 18:04:30 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Drawings and plans from competitions, students, and Ovaska's work as a professional and student.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Arthur Ovaska received his Bachelor of Architecture degree at Cornell University in 1974. After receiving his undergraduate degree at Cornell, Ovaska began graduate architecture studies with his mentor, professor and department chair O. M. Ungers. From 1974 to 1978, he collaborated with Ungers in Ithaca and Koand#x308;ln, Germany. Founded the office of Kollhoff andamp; Ovaska in Berlin in 1978 with Hans Kollhoff. Ovaska left Berlin in 1987 to accept a full-time academic position at Cornell. His career included appointments as director of undergraduate studies, director of graduate studies, and chair of the Department of Architecture.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Drawings and plans from competitions, students, and Ovaska's work as a professional and student.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Arthur Ovaska papers, #15-2-4329. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Student work that falls under FERPA is restricted to the life of the student or their permission.

controlaccess.subject: Architects.
Architecture.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. College of Architecture, Art, and Planning -- : Faculty.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 11x17 printed packet of final drawings, photocopies. Larger set of printed drawings, mixed with original sketches / working drawings, ink on trace paper

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of research and competition materials for the Salem Witch Trials Tercentenary Memorial Competition Program May 1991

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of brochures for historic tours in Salem area

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chapter book, titled, The Devil in Massachusetts by Marion L. Starkey

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Question/Answer sheet for questions about the competition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Site maps and photos (photocopies)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Volumes I and II of The Witchcraft Hysteria of 1692 by Leo Bonfanti

did.unittitle: Chapter book, titled, The Devil in Massachusetts by Marion L. Starkey

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Large collection of original process drawings and sketches, pencil/ink on trace - Prints of fnal drawings (S); Final drawings, pencil on thick card stock paper;B/W photographs of site; Misc. items : NYTimes page, lecture advertisement, work from Welfare Island; Student projects by A.Ovaska

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A miscellaneous collection of what appears to be one project. Most sketches are in plan and suggest site analysis / plan arrangement studies. Map of Berlin, prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of sketches: Ink on trace paper, Ink on cardstock. Smaller folder 8.5x11 photocopies of a figure ground map, site.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Presentation boards for Berlin Museum Extension competition: small-scale prints of original drawings mounted on cardstock; study drawings, pencil on vellum; shadow study; Map of site

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working drawings for proposed renovation of AAP Facilities project; Sketches - ink on trace paper / vellum; Primarily plan and axonometric studies

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a set of original drawings and presentation-quality prints for the Berlin Museum Garten, possibly curated for a lecture at Syracuse University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Presentation boards for Berlin Museum Extension competition - for exhibition (?) depicting precedent studies of various gardens (prints), as well as 1-2 original drawings of the project pasted onto card stock.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Study drawings in plan, originals, pen on newsprint paper. Set of trace paper sketches, ink on trace paper/newsprint.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of vellum prints, of plan drawing/axon/perspectives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: An extensive collection of drawings related to the Berlin Museum Garden - a combination of originals, prints

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of unlabeled sketches, ink on trace paper, relating to Berlin Museum garden. 2 maps of site, Berlin, Some colored

did.unittitle: Set of presentation boards for Berlin Museum Garden

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Shadow plan drawings, with precedent gardens included on sides. Section / elevation drawings, prints with original colored pencil work.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 01-A : Plan/Axonometric drawing of garden proposal, flanked on both sides by drawings/prints of historic precedent garden projects.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 01-B : Shadow plan of garden project, labeled Berlin Museum Garden, M 1:200.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 01-C : Shadow plan of garden project with labeled programmatic zones /building elements / section cut lines, text on right side, labeled Berlin Museum Garten, M 1:200

did.unittitle: Set of presentation boards for Berlin Museum Garden

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 01-D : 3 Elevation drawings, showing front elevation of Berlin Museum and 2 side elevations of the garden project, labeled Ansicht Lindenstrasse, Schnitt NN, and Schnitt M-M respectively, original colored pencil work over print.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 01-E : 3 section drawings through garden project, labeled Schnitt H-H, Schnitt J-J, and Schnitt K-K, original colored pencil work over print.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 01 - F : Longitudinal section drawing through Berlin museum and garden project proposal, original colored pencil work over print, labeled BMG : Berlin Museum Garten, Internat Bauasstellung 1984, Schmitt AA, Kolhoff and Ovaska.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 01 - G : Technical plan drawing of garden proposal, original colored pencil work over print, annotated with ground heights and dimensions, labeled BMG : Berlin Museum Garden, Internat Bauasstellung 1984, Vermessungsplan

did.unittitle: Welfare Island: competition submission for an urban design plan for Roosevelt Island

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Urban Scale, complete drawing set including Plans, axons, diagrams. Possibly collaborative work with OM Ungers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Multiple maps of Berlin, original drawings, all text in German.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Maps of Hamburg, full drawing set, all text in German. All labelled: Stadtebaulicher Idennweftbewerb Deichtor und Ericus.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Part of Sportparkplatz competition, two original drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 site plan of Savannah, original line drawing, ink on paper; 2 figure ground maps of Savannah, prints

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Maps of Berlin, prints on vellum, scale 1:500; Complete drawing set - plans, sections, elevations, prints on paper; All drawings labeled Wettbewerb, Lützowplatz, Berlin, Südliches Tiergartenviertel, Bauausstellung Berlin GmBH 1987"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Prints of hand drawings on paper; Complete drawing set of competition submission, primarily plan drawings; Perspective section drawings (cross/longitudinal)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawing set for Sportparkplatz competition, ink on vellum. Contains some prints.

did.unittitle: Housing Development Competition for Kita am Dennewitzpark

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 2 Maps of Berlin; Collection of trace paper sketches, Elevation drawings of various house facade typologies

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: (6) map/site plans of Berlin, prints, 1 aerial photograph plan, all labeled Der senator for Bau-und Wohnungswesen BERLIN, Bauwettbewerb Wohnbebauung ung Kita am Dennewitzpark (housing development competition).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Complete drawing set for competition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Extensive collection of process drawings, no final drawings. All contents wrapped in label reading : BMG Erweiterung: Skizzen, Unterlagen.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Aerial photograph map of Sudliches Tiergartenviertel

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of 5 prints: Plans, sections, and written description of design proposal for Sportparkplatz competition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Draft boards for competition (?)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All text in German

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 pencil axon drawing on trace paper - Large, process work

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 Axonometric drawing, original ink on paper, freehand. Depicts site with intervention attached

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Extremely large, long trace paper sketches, in axon, of an urban planning project, ink on trace paper

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some smaller sketches, depicting site plan, ink/colored pencil on trace paper

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 sketch annotated with ; CA 10 different sport activities, 10 playing felds for football, volleyball, badminton, etc. / playgrounds for children or different age groups / integrated leisure area, picnic area (grilling, coffee, fre)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Map of Berlin, print on vellum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of trace paper sketches.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Seemingly related to the contents of Tube 21, ink on trace paper, primarily in plan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Large Collection of sketches, all ink on trace paper

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sketches all in plan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Compilation of site research done about Savannah, Georgia.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Water supply / sanitary sewage lines plan drawing, prepared by Central of Georgia Railway water supply fre protection and sanitary sewer lines and shore and upper yard of Savannah, Georgia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Map / site plan of Savannah, line drawing, print

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Aerial photograph map of Chatham County, Georgia, photo date March 1985

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1:400 map/site plan of Savannah

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Map of Savannah, on glossy paper, labeled 1991 Average Daily Traffic Counts for Chatham County - Savannah, Georgia, June 1992

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Site map of the location of competition designs and elevations of buildings on nearby streets, labeled The New England Holocaust Memorial Competition, Plan, 1:20

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Site plan of greater context

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of trace paper sketches, ink/pencil on trace paper, primarily in plan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: photocopies of site, etc. Original pencil drawings on vellum, not labeled

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pencil and ink on trace paper and vellum.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of sketches, ink on trace paper

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Map of Ithaca East Quadrangle published by the NY Geological Survey

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Site plans, prints, labeled Village of Plainfeld Town Center Design Competition dated Oct 1996

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working drawings for town center design competition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: plans, site plans, zoning maps, trace paper sketches, elevation studies. etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of drawings transferred to black, ﬁlmy paper, depicting drawings of front facade studies of major classical architecture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Stack of working drawings, sketches, and research (newspaper articles, maps, print-outs) for Watkins Glen Graduate Design Studio 1974 by A.Ovaska. Some prints of final drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A miscellaneous collection of what appears to be 4 different projects, separated by plain sheets of paper. All contents are trace paper sketches or constructed drawings - NO labels, dates, or identifying info

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A miscellaneous collection of what appears to be 4 different projects, separated by plain sheets of paper. All contents are trace paper sketches or constructed drawings - NO labels, dates, or identifying info

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Complete final drawing set (ink on vellum) from 4th year design studio 1972; JA Wells, work by A.Ovaska; Rolling Home project; Final drawings, some sketches / study drawings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Housing project - a few misc. drawings - plans, axonometric, with OM Ungers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of work by A.Ovaska as a student, including : Design 106 (Ithaca City Hall), Design 102 (Stock Brokerage Office), Design 205 (Warehouse).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Final presentation boards from Design 102 - prints mounted on cardboard.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed maps of Ithaca / site plan from Design 106.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Print of axonometric drawings, Design 106.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous collection of trace paper sketches.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lecture/Exhibition poster labeled Cornell Architecture Faculty 1971 Buildings and Projects, AD White Museum of Art. Exhibition/Lecture poster titled Rational Architecture : The Architecture of a City, the Architectural Association. Set of prints/posters titled Rationalismo (all text in Italian), depicting various housing typologies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of presentation boards from Design Studio 104, work by A.Ovaska.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 03 - A : Site shadow plan drawing, labeled RH-BD, Row-House Block Development, Site Plan (Ground Plane), Ovaska 104, May 19th, 1971.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 03 - B : North and West section/elevation drawings, labeled RH-BD, Elevations, Sections Ovaska 104.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 03 - C : Axonometric drawing of project, projected from plan, labeled RHBD, Site Axonometric, Ovaska 104.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 03 - D : Plan drawings depicting of units Type A, Type B, and Type C, 2 perspective drawings of interior, labeled RH-BD, Plans, Unit Types, Ovaska 104.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Board 03 - E : Axonometric drawing of structural diagram, labeled with Spring Shut Doors, Removable Bottom for Cleaning - held in place by clamps.

scopecontent.p: Complete drawing set - plan, axonometric, diagrams (L)Misc. site plan, original color work on a B/W axonometric drawing, prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawings, ink on vellum, some colored. Includes process work drawings, sketches

scopecontent.p: Large misc collection of student work by A.Ovaska. Primarily original drawings, ink on vellum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes work from : Arch 205, Design 103 (Crafts Museum), Design 104, Design 105 (Ithaca City Hall), Tech 601, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Combination of working and final drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 drawing, section and shadow elevation, final drawing, original ink on paper, labeled Watkins Glen - Highway Experiment Section Type 1, AA Ovaska Conell University Graduate Studio May 1974

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: (2) S colorful graphic calendar posters for Feb and March; S army poster advertising C-54 Douglas airplane; Poster labeled "Orskliche Ausicht depicting extremely detailed elevation drawing of the Cathedral of Cologne (?) - artist credited as "Franz Schmitz, Der Dom zu KÃ¶ln, KÃ¶ln und Neub 1868-1879, Tafel 7 ; All text in German ; (Duplicate) PUMP - Cornell student publication, newspaper satire

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographiez! Kodak poster, advertising Ektachrome film, depicting 12 different versions of the same image of a tree in the landscape.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black and white, High resolution photo of feet, titled 278 Feet, Personality Posters Inc 1967 - (XL) b/w photo of hairy monster face, Personality Posters Inc 1967.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Exhibition poster, "Nekropolis, Michael Ruetz, 100 Photographien 1968-1976, all text in German.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.p: Set of 4 Le Corbusier posters, depicting a timeline of his works

scopecontent.p: Poster from Golden Oldies exhibition and drawing set of A.Ovaska's project from Design 106

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: prints on newspaper, possibly the project that was chosen to be exhibited (?)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Labeled Golden Oldies : Faculty as Students Show, East Sibley Corridor, 1946 1978, Cornell University Department of Architecture, Middling Reception Dragon Day 1987 11:00am, Sibley Hall

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Participants names listed on poster, including : Michael Cohen, Michael Dennis, Werner Goehner, George Hascup, Lee Hodgden, Alexander Kira, Victoria Meyers, John Miller, Leonard Mirin, Vincent Mulcahy, John Ostlund, Arthur Ovaska, John Shaw, Andrea Simitch, Val Warke, Jerry Wells, John Zissovici

did.unittitle: 2 Lecture posters advertising lectures by A.Ovaska at Savannah College of Art and Design (SCAD)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lenne and Schinkel in the Potsdam Landscape : Place Making Precedent, by Arthur Ovaska, Eichberg 304, SCAD Architecture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reconstruction : A Future Context for the Past, a Lecture by Arthur Ovaska, SCAD

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Exhibition poster titled "Syracuse University School of Architecture". Exhibition, the Berlin Museum Garden, Arthur A. Ovaska with Hans Kolhoff , multiple copies. Exhibition poster titled "BYGGTÍBERLÍN, sýning í ásmundarsal, fyrirlestrar í odda Arthur Ovaska og Hildebrand Machleid" all text in Icelandic, referring to a lecture about built works in Berlin. Exhibition poster titled "Modern Houses : A Documentation", Arch 152 Spring 1989, Hartell Gallery, professors Ovaska and Simitch; Lecture poster titled Arthur Ovaska : Urban Realizations in Berlin 1978-1988, Building in a Modern Context for Historical Mementos or 'There aren't no 'There' There,' Cornell Architecture, February 1988. 2 misc. site plans; 1 map of Plymouth County

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Site plans of Moscow, original drawings and some prints. Ink on vellum.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Appears to be a public housing proposal: multiple maps of lower Manhattan, all labeled "Office of Lower Manhattan Development"; original drawings of proposed project

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawings, complete set, ink/graphite on vellum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed map of site in Berlin; 5 original drawings, ink on vellum, freehanded

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Complete drawing set, primarily plan drawings ; Stamped by Kolhoff and Ovaska Architekten; Mostly prints, 1 original drawing

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proposed plans for extension for AAP Facilities/Campus; 2 schemes: C and D; Longitudinal sections through Sibley Dome , Fine Arts library area included; Plan of Arts Quad (photocopy print); Topographic map of surrounding site. A collaboration with Werner Goehner

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Plan drawings, prints; Base drawings for site research

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 4 original plan drawings, ink on vellum. No labels, dates, or other identifying information. Possibly student work?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Large photocopy of an elevation drawing of Rand Hall, labeled Rand Hall Sibley College, North Elevation Scale 1/4, Gibb and Waltz Architects

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of large prints of drawings, on newsprint, blue ink on off-white paper. Depicts plans, sections, elevations, axonometric. Possibly work by A.Ovaska (?), Only label SCB II 64121

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 original drawing, ink on vellum. Depicts section drawing of a tower with sloping sides and interior staircase. Dotted lines shown bouncing off sides of tower, relating to a set of squares labeled with numbers (structure, wind, light ?). Drawing of a boat (?) in lower right corner. No dates, labels, titles, or other identifying information

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Work by students from A.Ovaska's course - Architectural Analysis 231. Original drawings, ink on vellum. Depicts various analysis drawings of important architectural works, primarily facades and plans - S. Vito DâAntivole Cimtero Brion 1970, Carlo Scarpa, An Architectural Analysis, by Lyn Lopez, Arch. Anal. 231 , complete drawing set, original drawings, ink on vellum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Project 1: Notre Dame de Chartres, Chartres, France, 13th Century, by John Chen and Lilis Wu, complete drawing set, original drawings, ink on vellum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Project 2: Frank Lloyd Wright, Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum, NY NY 1965 complete drawing set, original drawings, ink on vellum

did.unittitle: Lee Hodgeden, Design : Museum at Aalborg - Originals, Sandra Schwart

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawing set, ink on vellum. Plans and sections for the design of a museum - No year, titles, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Plan, section, and shadow plan drawings of Aalto's Paimio. Original drawings, ink on vellum. Likely student work completed for an architectural analysis course (?) . No names, titles, labels, or other identifying information

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Complete drawing set analyzing Grand Central Terminal in NYC: Plan, section, elevation, axonometric drawings of GCT and the surrounding urban context. Original drawings, ink on vellum. Likely student work completed for an architectural analysis course (?). No name, label, date, or other identifying information

did.unittitle: Van der Poll, Aalto DWGs Hedemora

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Drawing set of Aalto's Hedemora. Original drawings, ink on vellum. 2 plans, 1 section. Likely student work completed for an architectural analysis course (?). No name, label, date, or other identifying information

scopecontent.p: Set of drawings transferred to black, flmy paper, Depicting drawings of front facade studies of major classical architecture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied 11x17 packet, depicting plans of ancient temples, old cathedrals, theater, and ancient architecture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies, organized into 6 sections, of historic garden precedents, depicting plan drawings, sections, photographs SMALL

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working drawings for feasibility study of Olin Library / AAP. Original drawings, freehand ink on paper / trace paper.

scopecontent.p: Photocopies of drawings / precedents

did.unittitle: Feasibility Study Expansion of Olin Library /AAP

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Complete design packet / analysis for the expansion of AAP. Presents 4 schemes - A, B, C D, - plans, sections, elevations, axonometric, photographs of model

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Stacks of photocopies of various sizes (primarily 11x17) of sections/fragments of line drawings appears to be plans, site plans

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1-2 original hand sketches, ink on card stock, trace paper

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of analysis maps of Berlin in color - traffc patterns, zoning, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Misc packet labeled Anatomy of Forms - What the Forms Are (Single Forms - Form Elements) depicting iterations of square/rectangular form manipulations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folder containing misc items labeled Housing Types / NYC Grid - containing newspaper article, reading packet, photocopies

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folder containing misc items labeled Milton Keynes - containing packet depicting housing typologies in Berlin/ other cities, mixed drawings/writing

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Misc. collection of drawings seeming to sample 1-2 drawings from each of A. Ovaska's projects - Welfare Island, Watkins Glen, Braunschweig (all prints, no originals) SMALL

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Misc. collection of trace paper sketches - no labels, dates, or other identifying information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 drawing, possibly sections through roods, labeled Offener Bauwettbewerb / Wohnbauung Mit Kindertagesstatte auf Dem Morbider Werder, Schnitte Stadtbahnviadukt M 1:200

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains 3 different projects: Original complete drawing set from Design 106 - Ithaca City Hall, ink on vellum; Set of prints from Berlin Museum Garten, 1981, stamped by Kolhoff and Ovaska perspectives and plans; Misc. set of ink on vellum drawings, depicting iterations of city block planning; 2 original site plan drawings, ink/colored pencil on paper (Moscow?)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of related sketches, all in plan, ink/colored pencil on trace paper. No label, date, title, or other identifying information. Site plans (?)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1 Board, depicting a longitudinal hand-drawn section / elevation. No labels, possibly relates to BMG project

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of plan and sections drawings, pencil on paper, labeled "Eric Boulet, Section 3"| Set of plan, section, elevation, axonometric (ﬁnal?) drawings, ink on vellum, likely a small housing project

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Plan of city blocks, numbered lots, London (?), 11x17 photocopy |Colored map labeled, "Karte von Berlin, Bezirk, Schoënberg" colored print on glossy paper|Plan sketch of area within a train station (pencil on paper)|Exhibition poster labeled "Nekropolis : Europäïsche Totenstädte, ihre Anlage undo Architektur ihre Bewohner, Michael Ruetz 100 Photographien 1968-1976"|Plan drawing, completely misc, photocopy, labeled "Fourth Floor"|Napkin sketch labeled "Teisch 519 State"|Elevations for a project in Ithaca, showing elevations from "Stewart Ave, Williams St., Cascadilla Gorge, Highland Place" - possibly Ithaca City Hall project|Trace paper sketch of plan|Other miscellaneous material
